title: pyrus aria var. incisa
intro: Pyrus aria var. incisa, also known as the Cut-leaved Whitebeam, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus aria var. incisa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the digestive system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by combining the bark, leaves, or flowers of the tree.
